title: Storybook MCP Addon Documentation And Package Metadata
citation: Storybook MCP documentation and npm package metadata for @storybook/addon-mcp, accessed 2026-05-04.
permitted_uses: Agent workflow planning for exposing local Storybook component stories through an MCP server.
claims_supported: Storybook documentation describes installing and registering the MCP addon with the Storybook CLI.
Storybook documentation says a running Storybook dev server exposes an MCP endpoint at /mcp on the Storybook port.
As queried on 2026-05-04, @storybook/addon-mcp 0.6.0 is MIT licensed.
As queried on 2026-05-04, @storybook/addon-mcp 0.6.0 declares peer support for Storybook 9.1.16 and 10.x prerelease/range variants.
claims_not_supported: That Storybook or @storybook/addon-mcp is installed in the OpenClinXR workspace.
That the MCP server should be exposed beyond local development without authentication and threat-model review.
That Storybook MCP can replace repository tests, accessibility checks, or Quest/WebXR runtime validation.
